Title: Coordinate source audit
Task: Audit every location field on DealershipProfile and Vehicle. Determine whether lat/lng columns must be added or if rooftopAddress JSON contains usable coords. Produce written decision doc.
Acceptance: Written field inventory; explicit decision on distance computation approach (DB columns vs. geocode at write vs. geocode at read); seed backfill plan if needed. COMPLETE: docs/plans/2026-06-08-geo-coordinate-source-audit.md
Tests: No code tests — this is an audit gate.
Notes: AUDIT COMPLETE 2026-06-08. rooftopAddress JSON has consistent {street,city,state,postalCode,country} shape but no lat/lng. No geocoding anywhere. MarketplaceUser has no location. No browser geolocation used. Decision: write-time geocoding into rooftopLat/rooftopLng Float? columns; buyer location as sessionStorage zip entry. See audit doc for full plan.

Title: Geocoding backfill script for existing dealer addresses
Task: Write offline script that reads all DealershipProfile rows with null rooftopLat/rooftopLng, calls geocoding provider, and writes results in batches. Provider-agnostic — accepts a geocode function as parameter. Idempotent.
Acceptance: Script processes all existing dealers; writes lat/lng where geocoding succeeds; skips failures; logs summary. Idempotent (re-runnable).
Tests: Script dry-run test with mock geocoder.
Notes: DONE 2026-06-08. Provider: OpenCage (OPENCAGE_API_KEY env var). runGeocodeBackfillService injectable — 7 tests pass (dry-run, live, confidence skip, null skip, error resilience, limit). Run: npm run geo:backfill [--dry-run] [--limit N]. Must run against production before GEO-01 ships.

Title: Write-time geocoding on dealer profile save
Task: Wire geocoding into the dealer profile create/update path. When rooftopAddress changes, geocode asynchronously and write result to rooftopLat/rooftopLng. Fail gracefully — never block the profile save.
Acceptance: Saving a valid address updates lat/lng; geocoding failure leaves lat/lng null; no profile save blocked by geocoding failure.
Tests: Unit tests with mock geocoder: success path writes coords; failure path leaves null; unchanged address skips geocoding.
Notes: DONE 2026-06-08. geocodeDealerIfNeeded service: structured result type (updated/already_geocoded/missing_address/low_confidence/failed); full try/catch; injectable GeocodeFn. Wired into dealerCreate.ts post-create (best-effort, no-op when OPENCAGE_API_KEY absent). 6 tests pass. fakeOnboard.ts/seedService.ts deferred (fixture coords cover local dev).

Acceptance: Existing calls still work; geo params accepted; invalid radius clamped to 1–500 mi; nationwide=true ignores radius; OpenAPI regenerated.
Tests: API contract tests for default (nationwide), radius, nationwide=true override. Distance sort uses offset pagination (no cursor).
Notes: DONE 2026-06-08 (commit e23eff6). boundingBox.ts: clampRadiusMiles/geoBoundingBox/shouldApplyGeoRadiusFilter. Prisma structured where (no raw SQL). Both feed+list share buildMarketplaceWhere. Fixture coords: Austin TX (30.2672/-97.7431) + Fort Lauderdale FL (26.1224/-80.1373). 8 tests pass in marketplaceGeoQuery.test.ts. No distanceMiles/Haversine/frontend/distance-sort added.

Title: Compute distance when coordinates exist
Task: Compute distanceMiles from buyer lat/lng to dealer rooftopLat/rooftopLng using Haversine raw SQL. Use bounding-box pre-filter then Haversine inside box. Include distanceMiles on card DTO when safely computable.
Acceptance: Cards include distanceMiles only when both buyer and seller coords exist; no fake 0 miles; field omitted entirely when coords unavailable.
Tests: Unit test with known coordinates (fixed lat/lng pairs); missing coordinate returns omitted field.
Notes: DONE 2026-06-08 (commit 711b9fa). haversine.ts: haversineMiles + cardDistanceMiles. distanceMiles?: number on MarketplaceVehicleCard DTO (omitted when coords absent). Tests in marketplaceGeoQuery.test.ts (distanceMiles describe block). rooftopAddress.ts extracted to src/lib/geo/. geoVerifyService + geo:verify script also added.

Acceptance: Filter hidden on single-category feeds (where it adds no value); visible only on cross-category/sites-index browse; does not create fake per-listing delivery options.
Tests: Sites-index filter tests; single-category page shows no fulfillment filter.
Notes: Downgraded P0→P1 and reframed. Display layer shipped (FulfillmentBadge). Per-listing filter was a category schema misread. Unblocks after sites-index cross-category browse is built.
